description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a low-pitched, expansive hip roof and a light-colored exterior. The front features a paved walkway flanked by palm trees, leading to a covered entryway and a garage on one side. Large windows are symmetrically arranged along the front and sides, providing ample natural light. The backyard includes a spacious wooden deck, a swimming pool, outdoor seating, and a small garden area, all enclosed by a wooden fence. The property is surrounded by well-maintained lawns and landscaping, with additional palm trees lining the perimeter. The overall design is open and inviting, blending indoor and outdoor living spaces typical of suburban neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a hip roof, symmetrical windows, a front walkway, garage, and a backyard featuring a pool, deck, and palm trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, paved walkway, and palm trees lining the front lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hip roof, large windows, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and deck area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck, swimming pool, outdoor seating, and fenced backyard.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the driveway, garage, side garden, and the transition from front to backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
